title: BetterStats
description: BetterStats is a customizable Minecraft plugin that displays player stats in a sleek, interactive GUI. by Gerhart
body:
📊 BetterStats – Free Premium Stats Plugin
BetterStats is a powerful and clean statistics plugin that lets players view their own or others’ Minecraft stats using the command /stats. It’s designed to upgrade your server experience and add value for your community – completely for free.

BetterStats 🤝 PlaceholderAPI, Vault, EssantialsX

✅ Features
📈 View your own stats with /stats

🔍 Check stats of any player with /stats <player>

🎨 Clean and modern message formatting

💎 Designed for survival, RPG, SMP, minigames & more

🧠 Lightweight & optimized for performance

💯 100% free and acts like a premium-quality plugin

🛠️ Why use BetterStats![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2b95c6f7ac2b76fdc86acd8a4d7bc9e532da1e8_0.webp)![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/918f6e548618124364ac7c776e3884d00d270400_0.webp)![Config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e965c0fcdbdf741a496d506eac5d87d740aeb3b_0.webp)![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0c28b159e7b82c4c8cae52be04b2e4155bf3feb_0.webp)?
Keeps your players engaged by letting them track their progress

Perfect for building leaderboards, progression systems, or achievements

A great addition to any competitive or community-driven server
